title: Buttery Mediterranean Mustard Seed Stir-fry
description: A fluffy and buttery vegetarian dish perfect for lazy Sundays, featuring mustard seeds in a simple and delicious stir-fry.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add onions and minced garlic, cooking until translucent and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Stir in mustard seeds, red pepper flakes, and tomato sauce. Let it simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Toss almonds with the mustard seed mixture until they are coated evenly.
Reduce heat to low and let the stir-fry cook gently, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes or until the mustard seeds are soft and caramelized.
Drizzle balsamic vinegar over the top just before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
